title: Amtech - Tile Grout Float for Even Spreading and Smooth Finish, Home DIY, Dual-Edged Design, Durable with High-Density Foam Pad and Aluminium Plate, Rounded Corners Prevent Damage (24 x 10cm)
features: EVEN SPREADING: This tile grouting float has a high density foam pad covered with a rubber base and bonded to an aluminium plate to ensure spreading
VERSATILE: This tile grout remover has bevelled edges, one with rounded corners and the other with square corners
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description The tile grouting float is constructed from a high-density foam pad and robust rubber base bonded to an aluminium plate for long lasting use that you can rely on. It’s ideal for both professionals and DIYers. With bevelled edges, one side of the float allows for precise application in tight spaces, while the other side boasts square corners for straight-line grouting. The foam pad provides excellent control and pressure distribution, ensuring an even application of grout and fewer uneven patches. The 24 x 10cm surface area is ideal for both small and large areas, while the rounded corners prevent damage to tiles for a neat finish that you can be proud of.
